reviews.comment:
Atencion perzonalizada y rapida gracias a la cantidad de surtidores. Ademas es sede del ACA central. Cuenta con un museo automovilistico muy interesante.

(Translated by Google)
Personalized and fast service thanks to the number of pumps. It's also the headquarters of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). It has a very interesting automotive museum.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLWV6emZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Una tortura cargar en esta EESS, los playeros atienden con mala gana, no te ofrecen nunca el ciclo de servicio, a la noche a pesar de ser más de 4 cierran todos los surtidores excepto 2, lo cual hace que esperar en la fila llegué a más de 30 minutos

(Translated by Google)
It's torture filling up at this gas station. The attendants are rude and never offer you the service schedule. At night, even though there are more than four of them, they close all but two pumps, which means waiting in line can take more than 30 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNmVuY2N3EAE
